calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq.  Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-28-2026 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-21-2026 Continued To Apr-28-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-18-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Casey Punches for petitioner and proposed administrator Roger Alan Brown, Jr. (via Zoom).
Kristy Hernandez for petitioner and proposed administrator Quang Minh Voung (via Zoom).
Darlene Morris for interested parties PHH Mortgage Corporation and Western Progressive, LLC (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on: 1) Petition for Letters of Administration; and 2) Order to Show Cause re: Preliminary Injunction on Sale of Real Property.

Casey Punches for petitioner and proposed administrator Roger Alan Brown, Jr. (via Zoom).
Kristy Hernandez for petitioner and proposed administrator Quang Minh Voung (via Zoom).
Darlene Morris for interested parties PHH Mortgage Corporation and Western Progressive, LLC (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on: 1) Petition for Letters of Administration; and 2) Order to Show Cause re: Preliminary Injunction on Sale of Real Property.

The Court stated it had reviewed the response to the Order to Show Cause and noted that a new petition for letters of administration had been filed. The Court further noted the pending foreclosure sale date and the hearing on the newly filed petition.

Counsel reported that the parties had reached an agreement regarding the administration of the estate, including the withdrawal of Roger Alan Brown, Jr.'s request for appointment and his non-opposition to the appointment of Quang Minh Vuong as administrator, and that the parties were cooperating to allow for a postponement of the foreclosure sale.

The matter was taken off calendar.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
EX PARTE APPLICATION TO RESTRAIN TRUSTEE SALE OF REAL PROPERTY
